item.title: At The MarTech Summit Hong Kong, DAL joined OneSignal to explore one of the biggest questions facing...
item.description: At The MarTech Summit Hong Kong, DAL joined OneSignal to explore one of the biggest questions facing modern marketing teams: How do we move from customer data to customer action — faster? Our answer: Segment smart. Engage personal. With OneSignal, those audiences can be activated across push, email, SMS, in-app and live engagement journeys. With Amazon Web Services (AWS) Quick, brands can turn behavioural and business data into actionable audiences — from high-intent buyers to churn-risk customers and next-best audiences. A big thank you to everyone who stopped by, shared their customer engagement challenges, and explored how intelligent segmentation can become measurable growth. Right customer. Right message. Right moment. Jessie Ko Nico Ng James B. Lindsay Suee Poon hashtag #DAL hashtag #DataAI_Lab hashtag #OneSignal hashtag #AmazonQuick hashtag #MarTechSummit hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #MarketingAutomation hashtag #CustomerEngagement hashtag #AIsegmentation hashtag #Personalisation hashtag #MasterConcept
item.content:encoded: At The MarTech Summit Hong Kong, DAL joined OneSignal to explore one of the biggest questions facing modern marketing teams: How do we move from customer data to customer action — faster? Our answer: Segment smart. Engage personal. With OneSignal, those audiences can be activated across push, email, SMS, in-app and live engagement journeys. With Amazon Web Services (AWS) Quick, brands can turn behavioural and business data into actionable audiences — from high-intent buyers to churn-risk customers and next-best audiences. A big thank you to everyone who stopped by, shared their customer engagement challenges, and explored how intelligent segmentation can become measurable growth. Right customer. Right message. Right moment. Jessie Ko Nico Ng James B. Lindsay Suee Poon hashtag #DAL hashtag #DataAI_Lab hashtag #OneSignal hashtag #AmazonQuick hashtag #MarTechSummit hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #MarketingAutomation hashtag #CustomerEngagement hashtag #AIsegmentation hashtag #Personalisation hashtag #MasterConcept

item.description: At The MarTech Summit Hong Kong, DAL joined OneSignal to explore one of the biggest questions facing modern marketing teams: How do we move from customer data to customer action — faster? Our answer: Segment smart. Engage personal. With OneSignal, those audiences can be activated across push, email, SMS, in-app and live engagement journeys. With Amazon Web Services (AWS) Quick, brands can turn behavioural and business data into actionable audiences — from high-intent buyers to churn-risk customers and next-best audiences. A big thank you to everyone who stopped by, shared their customer engagement challenges, and explored how intelligent segmentation can become measurable growth. Right customer. Right message. Right moment. Jessie Ko Nico Ng James B. Lindsay Suee Poon hashtag #DAL hashtag #DataAI_Lab hashtag #OneSignal hashtag #AmazonQuick hashtag #MarTechSummit hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #MarketingAutomation hashtag #CustomerEngagement hashtag #AIsegmentation hashtag #Personalisation hashtag #MasterConcept
item.content:encoded: At The MarTech Summit Hong Kong, DAL joined OneSignal to explore one of the biggest questions facing modern marketing teams: How do we move from customer data to customer action — faster? Our answer: Segment smart. Engage personal. With OneSignal, those audiences can be activated across push, email, SMS, in-app and live engagement journeys. With Amazon Web Services (AWS) Quick, brands can turn behavioural and business data into actionable audiences — from high-intent buyers to churn-risk customers and next-best audiences. A big thank you to everyone who stopped by, shared their customer engagement challenges, and explored how intelligent segmentation can become measurable growth. Right customer. Right message. Right moment. Jessie Ko Nico Ng James B. Lindsay Suee Poon hashtag #DAL hashtag #DataAI_Lab hashtag #OneSignal hashtag #AmazonQuick hashtag #MarTechSummit hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #MarketingAutomation hashtag #CustomerEngagement hashtag #AIsegmentation hashtag #Personalisation hashtag #MasterConcept

item.title: A Japanese visitor asked a question. Your staff paused, turned to a colleague. The visitor saw it. S...
item.description: A Japanese visitor asked a question. Your staff paused, turned to a colleague. The visitor saw it. Said thank you. Walked out. That wasn't a service failure. It was a language gap. Hong Kong and APAC companies receive hundreds of thousands of Japanese and Korean visitors every year. High-spending, high-intent customers. When they speak, most front-line staff reach for a phone translation app — and customers notice the difference between that and being understood. At DAL, we have a real-time, two-way voice translation system built on AWS. Two people on a call. Each speaks their own language. Each hears a translation in one to two seconds. No software to install, no new hardware, no changes to your existing phone system. Three things that make it actually usable in a business context: → Barge-in handling: you start speaking, the translation stops, the conversation stays clean → Custom glossary injection: your brand names, product codes, and service terms translate correctly → Zero infrastructure change: connects to your existing phone number, WhatsApp, or PBX The bigger opportunity is in the data. Every call connected to HubSpot and Amplitude becomes a structured signal. Your customers will not wait while you find a bilingual colleague. The language gap is removable. 📎 Full technical breakdown and industry applications in the comments. P.S. If your front-line team handles cross-language customer interactions every week, send me a message. Happy to share what we found.
item.content:encoded: A Japanese visitor asked a question. Your staff paused, turned to a colleague. The visitor saw it. Said thank you. Walked out. That wasn't a service failure. It was a language gap. Hong Kong and APAC companies receive hundreds of thousands of Japanese and Korean visitors every year. High-spending, high-intent customers. When they speak, most front-line staff reach for a phone translation app — and customers notice the difference between that and being understood. At DAL, we have a real-time, two-way voice translation system built on AWS. Two people on a call. Each speaks their own language. Each hears a translation in one to two seconds. No software to install, no new hardware, no changes to your existing phone system. Three things that make it actually usable in a business context: → Barge-in handling: you start speaking, the translation stops, the conversation stays clean → Custom glossary injection: your brand names, product codes, and service terms translate correctly → Zero infrastructure change: connects to your existing phone number, WhatsApp, or PBX The bigger opportunity is in the data. Every call connected to HubSpot and Amplitude becomes a structured signal. Your customers will not wait while you find a bilingual colleague. The language gap is removable. 📎 Full technical breakdown and industry applications in the comments. P.S. If your front-line team handles cross-language customer interactions every week, send me a message. Happy to share what we found.

item.title:
你的日文客戶剛掛電話了。
不是因為你的服務差。 是因為他說日文，你的客服說中文。 台灣和亞太區每間做跨境生意的公司都在面對這個問題——對日本、韓國、東南亞的客戶和供應商，語言摩擦每天都在發生，每天都...
item.description: 你的日文客戶剛掛電話了。 不是因為你的服務差。 是因為他說日文，你的客服說中文。 台灣和亞太區每間做跨境生意的公司都在面對這個問題——對日本、韓國、東南亞的客戶和供應商，語言摩擦每天都在發生，每天都在造成損失。 DAL 建立了一套在 AWS 上的即時雙向語音翻譯系統。 電話接起來，雙方各說各的語言，一到兩秒後對方聽到翻譯。不需要換電話系統，不需要安裝軟體，客戶那端什麼都不用做。 三個讓它在商業電話真正可用的設計： → 打斷偵測：你開口，翻譯停，對話不亂 → 術語字典：你的料號、規格、產業詞彙，翻得出來 → 零基礎設施改動：現有號碼、WhatsApp、PBX 直接接入 支援語言對：中日、中韓、中英、中泰、中越。 而且每通電話的資料都可以接進 CRM 和分析平台。 語言，不應該是生意的牆。 📎 完整技術架構和台灣行業應用場景，點擊下圖閱讀全文。 P.S. 你的團隊每週都在處理跨語言的電話嗎？留言或私訊，我們可以聊聊這套架構怎麼適配你的場景。
item.content:encoded: 你的日文客戶剛掛電話了。 不是因為你的服務差。 是因為他說日文，你的客服說中文。 台灣和亞太區每間做跨境生意的公司都在面對這個問題——對日本、韓國、東南亞的客戶和供應商，語言摩擦每天都在發生，每天都在造成損失。 DAL 建立了一套在 AWS 上的即時雙向語音翻譯系統。 電話接起來，雙方各說各的語言，一到兩秒後對方聽到翻譯。不需要換電話系統，不需要安裝軟體，客戶那端什麼都不用做。 三個讓它在商業電話真正可用的設計： → 打斷偵測：你開口，翻譯停，對話不亂 → 術語字典：你的料號、規格、產業詞彙，翻得出來 → 零基礎設施改動：現有號碼、WhatsApp、PBX 直接接入 支援語言對：中日、中韓、中英、中泰、中越。 而且每通電話的資料都可以接進 CRM 和分析平台。 語言，不應該是生意的牆。 📎 完整技術架構和台灣行業應用場景，點擊下圖閱讀全文。 P.S. 你的團隊每週都在處理跨語言的電話嗎？留言或私訊，我們可以聊聊這套架構怎麼適配你的場景。

item.title:
130+ conversations. Zero quiet moments.
That was DAL's first-ever presence at Amazon Web Services (...
item.description: 130+ conversations. Zero quiet moments. That was DAL's first-ever presence at Amazon Web Services (AWS) Summit Hong Kong — and what a way to start 🙌 Together with Asana, we hit the summit floor running. From the moment doors opened, it was non-stop — demoing AI Teammates live, walking through real agentic workflows, and having deep conversations with leaders who are genuinely ready to rethink how their teams work with AI. Proud of what we built together at that booth. Massive shoutout to Joshua Cheong from the Asana team for an incredible partnership, and to James B. Lindsay and Nico Ng for going the full distance from first badge scan to last handshake 👊 To everyone who stopped by — thank you. The conversations were real and we’re already following up. Missed it? Don’t worry — we’ve got a lot more coming. Follow our page to stay in the loop 👇 hashtag #AWSSummit hashtag #AWSSummitHK hashtag #Asana hashtag #AITeammates hashtag #AgenticAI hashtag #WorkManagement hashtag #HongKong hashtag #FirstButNotLast
item.content:encoded: 130+ conversations. Zero quiet moments. That was DAL's first-ever presence at Amazon Web Services (AWS) Summit Hong Kong — and what a way to start 🙌 Together with Asana, we hit the summit floor running. From the moment doors opened, it was non-stop — demoing AI Teammates live, walking through real agentic workflows, and having deep conversations with leaders who are genuinely ready to rethink how their teams work with AI. Proud of what we built together at that booth. Massive shoutout to Joshua Cheong from the Asana team for an incredible partnership, and to James B. Lindsay and Nico Ng for going the full distance from first badge scan to last handshake 👊 To everyone who stopped by — thank you. The conversations were real and we’re already following up. Missed it? Don’t worry — we’ve got a lot more coming. Follow our page to stay in the loop 👇 hashtag #AWSSummit hashtag #AWSSummitHK hashtag #Asana hashtag #AITeammates hashtag #AgenticAI hashtag #WorkManagement hashtag #HongKong hashtag #FirstButNotLast

item.title: Most AI chatbots in HK were useless before 2023. Here's what actually changed — RAG, multilingual su...
item.description: Most AI chatbots in HK were useless before 2023. Here's what actually changed — RAG, multilingual support, WhatsApp integration — and why it matters for your business now.
item.content:encoded: Most AI chatbots in HK were useless before 2023. Here's what actually changed — RAG, multilingual support, WhatsApp integration — and why it matters for your business now.

item.title:
🚀 We'll be at AWS Summit Hong Kong next week — will you?
📅 June 17, 2026 📍 HKCEC, Wan Chai
Come fi...
item.description: 🚀 We'll be at AWS Summit Hong Kong next week — will you? 📅 June 17, 2026 📍 HKCEC, Wan Chai Come find us at our booth — we're teaming up with Asana to show you what happens when AI-powered work management meets enterprise cloud infrastructure. Think: AI agents that actually understand your workflows, pull data from every tool your team uses, and execute — not just chat. Whether you're running ops, leading growth, or figuring out how AI fits into your stack — this is the conversation you don't want to miss. 🎁 Swing by our booth for a live demo + a little something we've prepared for visitors 👀 Drop a 🙋 in the comments if you'll be there — let's connect! hashtag #AWSSummit hashtag #AWSSummitHK hashtag #Asana hashtag #AI hashtag #EnterpriseAI hashtag #WorkManagement hashtag #HongKong hashtag #CloudComputing hashtag #DigitalTransformation
item.content:encoded: 🚀 We'll be at AWS Summit Hong Kong next week — will you? 📅 June 17, 2026 📍 HKCEC, Wan Chai Come find us at our booth — we're teaming up with Asana to show you what happens when AI-powered work management meets enterprise cloud infrastructure. Think: AI agents that actually understand your workflows, pull data from every tool your team uses, and execute — not just chat. Whether you're running ops, leading growth, or figuring out how AI fits into your stack — this is the conversation you don't want to miss. 🎁 Swing by our booth for a live demo + a little something we've prepared for visitors 👀 Drop a 🙋 in the comments if you'll be there — let's connect! hashtag #AWSSummit hashtag #AWSSummitHK hashtag #Asana hashtag #AI hashtag #EnterpriseAI hashtag #WorkManagement hashtag #HongKong hashtag #CloudComputing hashtag #DigitalTransformation

item.title:
一個識得用廣東話對答，唔會突然轉國語台嘅 AI Customer Service Agent - Fin AI ✨
We spoke Cantonese to Fin AI customer ser...
item.description: 一個識得用廣東話對答，唔會突然轉國語台嘅 AI Customer Service Agent - Fin AI ✨ We spoke Cantonese to Fin AI customer service agent. It understood every word. That was the moment the room filled with surprise. 😍 Most of the AI solution we've tested stumbles on Cantonese. It's always been the excuse: "We support Chinese" — meaning Mandarin, meaning not how your HK customers actually speak or type. Intercom's Fin handled it. Even for half-English half-Chinese — the way every HK person actually messages. Fin kept up without missing a beat. 45 languages. Native, not translated. Same agent, same context, same conversation. 👍 Fin is powered by the same AI that Anthropic (the company behind Claude) chose for their own customer support. If you've been told "AI doesn't work for Cantonese" — that's no longer true. Happy to show you what we showed the room. DM me or book 30 minutes: https://hubs.la/Q04jJkrj0 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #Intercom hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Cantonese
item.content:encoded: 一個識得用廣東話對答，唔會突然轉國語台嘅 AI Customer Service Agent - Fin AI ✨ We spoke Cantonese to Fin AI customer service agent. It understood every word. That was the moment the room filled with surprise. 😍 Most of the AI solution we've tested stumbles on Cantonese. It's always been the excuse: "We support Chinese" — meaning Mandarin, meaning not how your HK customers actually speak or type. Intercom's Fin handled it. Even for half-English half-Chinese — the way every HK person actually messages. Fin kept up without missing a beat. 45 languages. Native, not translated. Same agent, same context, same conversation. 👍 Fin is powered by the same AI that Anthropic (the company behind Claude) chose for their own customer support. If you've been told "AI doesn't work for Cantonese" — that's no longer true. Happy to show you what we showed the room. DM me or book 30 minutes: https://hubs.la/Q04jJkrj0 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #Intercom hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Cantonese

item.title:
The best salesperson doesn't push products. They ask better questions.
"What's the occasion?"
Thr...
item.description: The best salesperson doesn't push products. They ask better questions. "What's the occasion?" Throwing the questions in, they know more about what you need than you do. No bias. No hidden agenda. No pushing whatever's on promotion this week. Intercom's Fin for E-commerce doesn't stop at the first question. It keeps listening, digs deeper and discovers what your customer actually needs — even when they can't articulate it themselves. When that same customer comes back next week with a return? Same agent. Same context. No "can you explain your issue again." One agent that sells like your best salesperson and supports like your best service rep. No handoff in between. hashtag #Ecommerce hashtag #Intercom hashtag #AIAgent
item.content:encoded: The best salesperson doesn't push products. They ask better questions. "What's the occasion?" Throwing the questions in, they know more about what you need than you do. No bias. No hidden agenda. No pushing whatever's on promotion this week. Intercom's Fin for E-commerce doesn't stop at the first question. It keeps listening, digs deeper and discovers what your customer actually needs — even when they can't articulate it themselves. When that same customer comes back next week with a return? Same agent. Same context. No "can you explain your issue again." One agent that sells like your best salesperson and supports like your best service rep. No handoff in between. hashtag #Ecommerce hashtag #Intercom hashtag #AIAgent

item.title:
Your customers come with buying intent, not keywords.
"A birthday gift for my mum who hates pink." ...
item.description: Your customers come with buying intent, not keywords. "A birthday gift for my mum who hates pink." "A laptop for my daughter — light, under $8K." Your store hands them a search bar and let themselves figure it out. They feel unheard. They leave. You call it bounce rate. It's not a traffic problem. It's a listening problem. And it's been broken for a decade. Intercom just launched Fin for E-commerce. It listens to what your customers actually mean — asks follow-up questions. It narrows thousands of products to three that fit. It walks them to checkout. hashtag #Ecommerce hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #AIAgent
item.content:encoded: Your customers come with buying intent, not keywords. "A birthday gift for my mum who hates pink." "A laptop for my daughter — light, under $8K." Your store hands them a search bar and let themselves figure it out. They feel unheard. They leave. You call it bounce rate. It's not a traffic problem. It's a listening problem. And it's been broken for a decade. Intercom just launched Fin for E-commerce. It listens to what your customers actually mean — asks follow-up questions. It narrows thousands of products to three that fit. It walks them to checkout. hashtag #Ecommerce hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #AIAgent

Your store hands them a search bar and let themselves figure it out. They feel unheard. They leave. You call it bounce rate. It's not a traffic problem. It's a listening problem. And it's been broken for a decade. Intercom just launched Fin for E-commerce. It listens to what your customers actually mean — asks follow-up questions. It narrows thousands of products to three that fit. It walks them to checkout. hashtag #Ecommerce hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #AIAgent

item.title:
當你的 AI 「太過」樂於助人——但你完全唔介意，甚至有點可愛。🙂
老實講，我哋好鍾意呢種vibe。🌟 有位客人問 McDonald's 嘅 AI 點樣寫 Python——而佢真係答到。答得啱。然後...
item.description: 當你的 AI 「太過」樂於助人——但你完全唔介意，甚至有點可愛。🙂 老實講，我哋好鍾意呢種vibe。🌟 有位客人問 McDonald's 嘅 AI 點樣寫 Python——而佢真係答到。答得啱。然後問你要唔要加 McNuggets。🍟🍔 🥰 呢啲唔係失敗。呢個係一個超越本份嘅 AI——令客人喜出望外又不忘本分 。 最好嘅客戶 AI 唔係淨係答眼前嘅問題。佢會捉到個 moment，俾你一個驚喜，然後依然做好真正重要嘅任務。 呢個就係 DAL 追求嘅標準——做到令人想截圖分享嘅 AI。 AI 做過最出乎你意料嘅嘢係咩？留言話我哋知 👇
item.content:encoded: 當你的 AI 「太過」樂於助人——但你完全唔介意，甚至有點可愛。🙂 老實講，我哋好鍾意呢種vibe。🌟 有位客人問 McDonald's 嘅 AI 點樣寫 Python——而佢真係答到。答得啱。然後問你要唔要加 McNuggets。🍟🍔 🥰 呢啲唔係失敗。呢個係一個超越本份嘅 AI——令客人喜出望外又不忘本分 。 最好嘅客戶 AI 唔係淨係答眼前嘅問題。佢會捉到個 moment，俾你一個驚喜，然後依然做好真正重要嘅任務。 呢個就係 DAL 追求嘅標準——做到令人想截圖分享嘅 AI。 AI 做過最出乎你意料嘅嘢係咩？留言話我哋知 👇

item.title: Your CRM knows the customer. Your analytics knows the behaviour. Your marketing automation knows the...
item.description: Your CRM knows the customer. Your analytics knows the behaviour. Your marketing automation knows the journey. But who connects the dots? That’s Customer Intelligence. It turns scattered customer signals into smarter decisions, faster actions, and measurable growth. Signal → Decide → Act → Learn. Not more dashboards. Not more disconnected tools. A smarter system for customer growth. Customer Intelligence. Delivered. hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AI hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #CDP hashtag #MarketingAutomation hashtag #B2BMarketing hashtag #DAL
item.content:encoded: Your CRM knows the customer. Your analytics knows the behaviour. Your marketing automation knows the journey. But who connects the dots? That’s Customer Intelligence. It turns scattered customer signals into smarter decisions, faster actions, and measurable growth. Signal → Decide → Act → Learn. Not more dashboards. Not more disconnected tools. A smarter system for customer growth. Customer Intelligence. Delivered. hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AI hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #CDP hashtag #MarketingAutomation hashtag #B2BMarketing hashtag #DAL

item.title:
IKEA's AI chatbot saved €13 million. That's the story most people heard.
Here's the part they misse...
item.description: IKEA's AI chatbot saved €13 million. That's the story most people heard. Here's the part they missed: the 53% of conversations the chatbot couldn't handle turned out to be buying signals. Interior design advice. Space planning. Furniture coordination. IKEA reskilled 8,500 staff as design consultants. That channel made HK$10.9 billion in year one. The savings were the floor. The revenue was the ceiling. 100× difference. We wrote the 4-minute version. Read now and get inspired. hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #HongKong
item.content:encoded: IKEA's AI chatbot saved €13 million. That's the story most people heard. Here's the part they missed: the 53% of conversations the chatbot couldn't handle turned out to be buying signals. Interior design advice. Space planning. Furniture coordination. IKEA reskilled 8,500 staff as design consultants. That channel made HK$10.9 billion in year one. The savings were the floor. The revenue was the ceiling. 100× difference. We wrote the 4-minute version. Read now and get inspired. hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #HongKong

item.title:
Your AI chatbot answers five FAQs on repeat. Your customers leave after two minutes.
Sound familiar...
item.description: Your AI chatbot answers five FAQs on repeat. Your customers leave after two minutes. Sound familiar? That was the default experience in Hong Kong for years. But AI chatbots in 2026 are fundamentally different from the ones you tried in 2019. Six things have changed — and most HK businesses haven't noticed yet. We wrote the short version. 5-minute read. 🔗 Link in first comment. hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #HongKong
item.content:encoded: Your AI chatbot answers five FAQs on repeat. Your customers leave after two minutes. Sound familiar? That was the default experience in Hong Kong for years. But AI chatbots in 2026 are fundamentally different from the ones you tried in 2019. Six things have changed — and most HK businesses haven't noticed yet. We wrote the short version. 5-minute read. 🔗 Link in first comment. hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #HongKong

item.title:
會員系統，不應只是「電子印花卡」。
如果你的平台只能： 記錄消費 發優惠券 群發訊息
那它不是增長引擎，只是資料倉庫。
今天企業真正需要的是一套能夠：
看懂會員行為 自動分群與打標籤 串接 P...
item.description: 會員系統，不應只是「電子印花卡」。 如果你的平台只能： 記錄消費 發優惠券 群發訊息 那它不是增長引擎，只是資料倉庫。 今天企業真正需要的是一套能夠： 看懂會員行為 自動分群與打標籤 串接 POS / CRM / GA4 / CDP 即時觸發個人化互動 預測流失與下一步需求的智慧會員經營系統。 我們剛整理了一篇文章，分享： 會員系統應具備的核心功能、推薦選型重點，以及結合 CDP 後如何由「資料紀錄」升級為「智慧決策」。 如果你正計劃優化會員經營、提升忠誠度與 ROI，這篇值得一讀。 閱讀全文： 《會員管理系統與架構介紹：會員系統功能及推薦的選擇因素》 https://hubs.la/Q04fdVSZ0 hashtag #會員系統 hashtag #CDP hashtag #數位轉型 hashtag #顧客經營 hashtag #MarketingAutomation hashtag #DAL hashtag #MasterConcept
item.content:encoded: 會員系統，不應只是「電子印花卡」。 如果你的平台只能： 記錄消費 發優惠券 群發訊息 那它不是增長引擎，只是資料倉庫。 今天企業真正需要的是一套能夠： 看懂會員行為 自動分群與打標籤 串接 POS / CRM / GA4 / CDP 即時觸發個人化互動 預測流失與下一步需求的智慧會員經營系統。 我們剛整理了一篇文章，分享： 會員系統應具備的核心功能、推薦選型重點，以及結合 CDP 後如何由「資料紀錄」升級為「智慧決策」。 如果你正計劃優化會員經營、提升忠誠度與 ROI，這篇值得一讀。 閱讀全文： 《會員管理系統與架構介紹：會員系統功能及推薦的選擇因素》 https://hubs.la/Q04fdVSZ0 hashtag #會員系統 hashtag #CDP hashtag #數位轉型 hashtag #顧客經營 hashtag #MarketingAutomation hashtag #DAL hashtag #MasterConcept

item.title:
當你的 AI Chatbot 還在重複回答同一堆 FAQ，客戶談了兩分鐘就離開。而他們最想表達的需求，就這樣一併消失了。
成功的 AI Chatbot 不只能節省成本。還是你最強大的客戶聲音收集工具...
item.description: 當你的 AI Chatbot 還在重複回答同一堆 FAQ，客戶談了兩分鐘就離開。而他們最想表達的需求，就這樣一併消失了。 成功的 AI Chatbot 不只能節省成本。還是你最強大的客戶聲音收集工具。 很多企業都忽略了一件事：Chatbot 不單在提供資訊，——而是客戶在告訴你，他們真正需要的是什麼。 Anthropic——Claude AI 的母公司——選擇了 Intercom Fin 作為自己的客服方案。不是因為他們無法自行開發，而是因為大規模的客戶服務，單靠一個好的 AI 模型並不足夠。 你的 Chatbot 應該在收集客戶心聲，而不是把客戶趕走。 5月27日 · 下午2–5時 · 中環 · 20個名額 嘉賓：Charmaine M. — Intercom 亞太區合作夥伴主管 如果你的 AI Chatbot 正在流失客戶而不是了解客戶，這就是你需要參與的對話。 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #Intercom hashtag #HongKong
item.content:encoded: 當你的 AI Chatbot 還在重複回答同一堆 FAQ，客戶談了兩分鐘就離開。而他們最想表達的需求，就這樣一併消失了。 成功的 AI Chatbot 不只能節省成本。還是你最強大的客戶聲音收集工具。 很多企業都忽略了一件事：Chatbot 不單在提供資訊，——而是客戶在告訴你，他們真正需要的是什麼。 Anthropic——Claude AI 的母公司——選擇了 Intercom Fin 作為自己的客服方案。不是因為他們無法自行開發，而是因為大規模的客戶服務，單靠一個好的 AI 模型並不足夠。 你的 Chatbot 應該在收集客戶心聲，而不是把客戶趕走。 5月27日 · 下午2–5時 · 中環 · 20個名額 嘉賓：Charmaine M. — Intercom 亞太區合作夥伴主管 如果你的 AI Chatbot 正在流失客戶而不是了解客戶，這就是你需要參與的對話。 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AICustomerService hashtag #Intercom hashtag #HongKong

item.title:
When your AI gets 'too' helpful - and you're not even mad about it. 🙂
Honestly? We love this energ...
item.description: When your AI gets 'too' helpful - and you're not even mad about it. 🙂 Honestly? We love this energy. 🌟 A customer asked McDonald's AI for Python help — and it delivered. Correctly. Then asked if you wanted McNuggets. 🍟 🍔 That's not a failure. That's a bot that went beyond its job description — and left the customer delighted and slightly confused. The best customer AI doesn't just answer the question in front of it. It reads the moment, surprises you, and still closes the loop on what actually matters. That's the bar we build toward at DAL — AI that earns a screenshot. What's the most unexpectedly helpful thing an AI has done for you? Drop it below 👇 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AIchatbot hashtag #CX hashtag #Intercom hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #HongKongTech hashtag #DAL hashtag #MarTech hashtag #AIexceedsexpectations
item.content:encoded: When your AI gets 'too' helpful - and you're not even mad about it. 🙂 Honestly? We love this energy. 🌟 A customer asked McDonald's AI for Python help — and it delivered. Correctly. Then asked if you wanted McNuggets. 🍟 🍔 That's not a failure. That's a bot that went beyond its job description — and left the customer delighted and slightly confused. The best customer AI doesn't just answer the question in front of it. It reads the moment, surprises you, and still closes the loop on what actually matters. That's the bar we build toward at DAL — AI that earns a screenshot. What's the most unexpectedly helpful thing an AI has done for you? Drop it below 👇 hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #AIchatbot hashtag #CX hashtag #Intercom hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #HongKongTech hashtag #DAL hashtag #MarTech hashtag #AIexceedsexpectations

item.title: 351,000 GitHub stars. 3.2 million monthly active users. More popular than React ever was. Then HKCER...
item.description: 351,000 GitHub stars. 3.2 million monthly active users. More popular than React ever was. Then HKCERT issued a security advisory. OpenClaw（龍蝦）is the fastest-growing open-source AI agent in history. It can read your email, browse the web, control your files, and message your customers on WhatsApp — all autonomously. But Palo Alto Networks flagged what they called a "lethal trifecta": access to private data, exposure to untrusted content, and the ability to take external actions with persistent memory. For Hong Kong enterprises handling customer data across regulated industries — this isn't a toy. We broke down what OpenClaw actually does, the 9 CVEs discovered so far, and what enterprises should consider before deploying any AI agent. Full breakdown 👇 https://hubs.la/Q04cgHb30 hashtag #OpenClaw hashtag #AIAgents hashtag #HongKong hashtag #EnterpriseAI hashtag #CustomerIntelligence
item.content:encoded: 351,000 GitHub stars. 3.2 million monthly active users. More popular than React ever was. Then HKCERT issued a security advisory. OpenClaw（龍蝦）is the fastest-growing open-source AI agent in history. It can read your email, browse the web, control your files, and message your customers on WhatsApp — all autonomously. But Palo Alto Networks flagged what they called a "lethal trifecta": access to private data, exposure to untrusted content, and the ability to take external actions with persistent memory. For Hong Kong enterprises handling customer data across regulated industries — this isn't a toy. We broke down what OpenClaw actually does, the 9 CVEs discovered so far, and what enterprises should consider before deploying any AI agent. Full breakdown 👇 https://hubs.la/Q04cgHb30 hashtag #OpenClaw hashtag #AIAgents hashtag #HongKong hashtag #EnterpriseAI hashtag #CustomerIntelligence

item.title:
Wrapping Up! AI & U: Defining the Future of Work 🚀
Body: What an incredible turnout at the Master C...
item.description: Wrapping Up! AI & U: Defining the Future of Work 🚀 Body: What an incredible turnout at the Master Concept HK Solution Day! A huge thank you to the hundreds of industry leaders who joined us at HKCEC to explore our theme: "AI & U." From the packed keynote sessions to the buzzing hands-on workshops, one thing is clear: AI isn't just a tool—it is the engine empowering the workforce ("U") and redefining customer experiences. Key Takeaways: ✅ Google Cloud revealed the roadmap to 2026. ✅ The Security Series proved that safety starts with human behavior, not just tools. ✅ AI Agents are shifting customer service from reactive to proactive. ✅ Geospatial with AI unlocked tremendous possibilities Missed the event? Stay tuned as we recap the key insights from our partners over the coming days! hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HKSolutionDay hashtag #AIandU hashtag #GoogleCloud hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #EventRecap
item.content:encoded: Wrapping Up! AI & U: Defining the Future of Work 🚀 Body: What an incredible turnout at the Master Concept HK Solution Day! A huge thank you to the hundreds of industry leaders who joined us at HKCEC to explore our theme: "AI & U." From the packed keynote sessions to the buzzing hands-on workshops, one thing is clear: AI isn't just a tool—it is the engine empowering the workforce ("U") and redefining customer experiences. Key Takeaways: ✅ Google Cloud revealed the roadmap to 2026. ✅ The Security Series proved that safety starts with human behavior, not just tools. ✅ AI Agents are shifting customer service from reactive to proactive. ✅ Geospatial with AI unlocked tremendous possibilities Missed the event? Stay tuned as we recap the key insights from our partners over the coming days! hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HKSolutionDay hashtag #AIandU hashtag #GoogleCloud hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #EventRecap

item.title: We asked Hong Kong’s digital leaders what keeps them up at night. The answer wasn't "More Traffic."...
item.description: We asked Hong Kong’s digital leaders what keeps them up at night. The answer wasn't "More Traffic." It was "AI Visibility." Just wrapped up an incredible executive session with Amplitude. The energy in the room was electric, but the post-event data tells the real story. We surveyed our guests—leaders from Finance, Retail, and Tech—on their #1 priority for 2026. The overwhelming winner? Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). The realization is hitting hard: ❌ Ranking #1 on Google doesn't matter if ChatGPT answers the user's question without a click. ✅ The new battleground is ensuring your brand is "visible" and "recommended" by AI agents. A huge thank you to everyone who joined the conversation. The shift from "Search" to "Answer" is here, and today proved that Hong Kong's top enterprises are ready to tackle it. Missed the session? We are opening up 5 more slots for the Custom AI Visibility Audit (the same one our guests received). Comment "VISIBILITY" below, and I’ll DM you the details. James B. Lindsay Baljin S. Amelia Xu Ai Nico Ng hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AI hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #GEO hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #DataAnalytics
item.content:encoded: We asked Hong Kong’s digital leaders what keeps them up at night. The answer wasn't "More Traffic." It was "AI Visibility." Just wrapped up an incredible executive session with Amplitude. The energy in the room was electric, but the post-event data tells the real story. We surveyed our guests—leaders from Finance, Retail, and Tech—on their #1 priority for 2026. The overwhelming winner? Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). The realization is hitting hard: ❌ Ranking #1 on Google doesn't matter if ChatGPT answers the user's question without a click. ✅ The new battleground is ensuring your brand is "visible" and "recommended" by AI agents. A huge thank you to everyone who joined the conversation. The shift from "Search" to "Answer" is here, and today proved that Hong Kong's top enterprises are ready to tackle it. Missed the session? We are opening up 5 more slots for the Custom AI Visibility Audit (the same one our guests received). Comment "VISIBILITY" below, and I’ll DM you the details. James B. Lindsay Baljin S. Amelia Xu Ai Nico Ng hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AI hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #GEO hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #DataAnalytics

item.title:
The "Zero-Click" era is here. Is your SEO strategy fighting the wrong war?
It’s the nightmare scena...
item.description: The "Zero-Click" era is here. Is your SEO strategy fighting the wrong war? It’s the nightmare scenario for every digital leader: You rank #1 on Google, but your traffic is flat. Why? Because the user never clicked. They got their answer from an AI summary and moved on. The data confirms the shift: 📉 Zero-click searches are skyrocketing. 📉 CTRs are plummeting as AI overviews take over. 📉 80% of consumers (Bain & Co) no longer rely solely on traditional search to learn about brands. If a potential client asks ChatGPT or Claude about your solution, do you know what it says? Is it recommending you? Or your competitor? Until now, this was a blind spot. Not anymore. Join us on Dec 3 for an exclusive executive luncheon with Amplitude. We are unveiling the new AI Visibility framework—the first tool designed to measure your standing in the age of LLMs. Exclusive for attendees: We will be generating a Custom AI Visibility Report for your brand, showing you exactly how you rank in AI-generated answers today. Stop guessing. Start measuring. 👉 Request your seat here (Private Dining): https://hubs.la/Q03W0Vx50 Event details in comment. hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AEO hashtag #AIAnalytics hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #MarketingStrategy
item.content:encoded: The "Zero-Click" era is here. Is your SEO strategy fighting the wrong war? It’s the nightmare scenario for every digital leader: You rank #1 on Google, but your traffic is flat. Why? Because the user never clicked. They got their answer from an AI summary and moved on. The data confirms the shift: 📉 Zero-click searches are skyrocketing. 📉 CTRs are plummeting as AI overviews take over. 📉 80% of consumers (Bain & Co) no longer rely solely on traditional search to learn about brands. If a potential client asks ChatGPT or Claude about your solution, do you know what it says? Is it recommending you? Or your competitor? Until now, this was a blind spot. Not anymore. Join us on Dec 3 for an exclusive executive luncheon with Amplitude. We are unveiling the new AI Visibility framework—the first tool designed to measure your standing in the age of LLMs. Exclusive for attendees: We will be generating a Custom AI Visibility Report for your brand, showing you exactly how you rank in AI-generated answers today. Stop guessing. Start measuring. 👉 Request your seat here (Private Dining): https://hubs.la/Q03W0Vx50 Event details in comment. hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AEO hashtag #AIAnalytics hashtag #Amplitude hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #CustomerIntelligence hashtag #MarketingStrategy

item.title:
If you live in HubSpot all day, you know the pain:
Claude gives you a smart insight… and you still ...
item.description: If you live in HubSpot all day, you know the pain: Claude gives you a smart insight… and you still have to click around HubSpot to actually do anything with it. 😅 Not anymore. Claude 🤝 HubSpot = Real AI CRM Assistant With the new Claude–HubSpot upgrade, you can now: 🔸 Create / update contacts, deals, tasks, notes directly from Claude 🔸 Let Claude read real engagement history (emails, calls, meetings, tasks, notes) 🔸 Go from insight ➜ action in one step Why it matters: - ⚡ Work faster – no more breaking flow to “update later” - 🧠 Better insights – Claude sees full deal context - 🧾 Less admin – if Claude finds it, Claude can update it - 🎯 Smarter decisions – CRM finally feels alive At DAL (Digital Action Lab by Master Concept Group), we’re already helping teams in HK & TW plug Claude into HubSpot and turn it into a real GTM copilot, not just a database. Want Claude working inside your HubSpot, not just beside it? 👉 DM us and we’ll show you what’s possible. hashtag #DigitalActionLab hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #ClaudeAI hashtag #RevOps hashtag #MarketingAutomation
item.content:encoded: If you live in HubSpot all day, you know the pain: Claude gives you a smart insight… and you still have to click around HubSpot to actually do anything with it. 😅 Not anymore. Claude 🤝 HubSpot = Real AI CRM Assistant With the new Claude–HubSpot upgrade, you can now: 🔸 Create / update contacts, deals, tasks, notes directly from Claude 🔸 Let Claude read real engagement history (emails, calls, meetings, tasks, notes) 🔸 Go from insight ➜ action in one step Why it matters: - ⚡ Work faster – no more breaking flow to “update later” - 🧠 Better insights – Claude sees full deal context - 🧾 Less admin – if Claude finds it, Claude can update it - 🎯 Smarter decisions – CRM finally feels alive At DAL (Digital Action Lab by Master Concept Group), we’re already helping teams in HK & TW plug Claude into HubSpot and turn it into a real GTM copilot, not just a database. Want Claude working inside your HubSpot, not just beside it? 👉 DM us and we’ll show you what’s possible. hashtag #DigitalActionLab hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #ClaudeAI hashtag #RevOps hashtag #MarketingAutomation

item.title: Static campaigns are dead. Long live the Loop. 🔄 Incredible energy at our "Beyond the Funnel" execut...
item.description: Static campaigns are dead. Long live the Loop. 🔄 Incredible energy at our "Beyond the Funnel" executive luncheon! We spent the afternoon with Hong Kong’s marketing elite, dismantling the old way of planning and building the new Adaptive AI Engine for 2026. The highlight? Seeing the lightbulbs go on when we demonstrated how HubSpot’s Loop Marketing solves the biggest pain point leaders face today: ⚡ Speed. ⚡ 🌟 Star Speakers: ✨ Carol Fong, HubSpot's Head of Sales, Asia, showed us why the funnel is broken and how the Loop helps you adapt in real-time. ✨ James B. Lindsay Lindsay, Master Concept Group Concept's Director of Analytics, showed us exactly how to connect the data to make that engine run. To everyone who joined us: Thank you for the heated discussion and the insights. To those who couldn't make it: We are already planning the next one. Make sure you’re on the list. 🚀 Nico Ng Christine Leung hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AI hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #HKBusiness
item.content:encoded: Static campaigns are dead. Long live the Loop. 🔄 Incredible energy at our "Beyond the Funnel" executive luncheon! We spent the afternoon with Hong Kong’s marketing elite, dismantling the old way of planning and building the new Adaptive AI Engine for 2026. The highlight? Seeing the lightbulbs go on when we demonstrated how HubSpot’s Loop Marketing solves the biggest pain point leaders face today: ⚡ Speed. ⚡ 🌟 Star Speakers: ✨ Carol Fong, HubSpot's Head of Sales, Asia, showed us why the funnel is broken and how the Loop helps you adapt in real-time. ✨ James B. Lindsay Lindsay, Master Concept Group Concept's Director of Analytics, showed us exactly how to connect the data to make that engine run. To everyone who joined us: Thank you for the heated discussion and the insights. To those who couldn't make it: We are already planning the next one. Make sure you’re on the list. 🚀 Nico Ng Christine Leung hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #AI hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #HKBusiness

item.title:
Is your brand invisible to ChatGPT? 🤖
📉 Google search volume is dropping. 📈 AI answers are skyrock...
item.description: Is your brand invisible to ChatGPT? 🤖 📉 Google search volume is dropping. 📈 AI answers are skyrocketing. If you aren't optimizing for AI citations, you aren't just losing traffic—you're vanishing from the conversation. Do you know where you rank against your competitors in AI search right now? We do. And we’ll show you. 🌟 Join DAL & Amplitude for an exclusive lunch. 🚀 We’ll teach you how to win the "GEO" war. 🌟 Plus, you’ll walk away with a free Custom "AI Visibility Report" to fix your gaps immediately. Don't fly blind. Grab your invite.
item.content:encoded: Is your brand invisible to ChatGPT? 🤖 📉 Google search volume is dropping. 📈 AI answers are skyrocketing. If you aren't optimizing for AI citations, you aren't just losing traffic—you're vanishing from the conversation. Do you know where you rank against your competitors in AI search right now? We do. And we’ll show you. 🌟 Join DAL & Amplitude for an exclusive lunch. 🚀 We’ll teach you how to win the "GEO" war. 🌟 Plus, you’ll walk away with a free Custom "AI Visibility Report" to fix your gaps immediately. Don't fly blind. Grab your invite.

item.title:
🫣 Is Your Marketing Campaign Catching Up with the AI-driven trends?
🔎 Running traditional, linear c...
item.description: 🫣 Is Your Marketing Campaign Catching Up with the AI-driven trends? 🔎 Running traditional, linear campaigns is like navigating with an outdated map—by the time you act, the opportunity is gone. 👋 Join our HubSpot and Master Concept Group to grow INBOUND sales with HubSpot AI.
item.content:encoded: 🫣 Is Your Marketing Campaign Catching Up with the AI-driven trends? 🔎 Running traditional, linear campaigns is like navigating with an outdated map—by the time you act, the opportunity is gone. 👋 Join our HubSpot and Master Concept Group to grow INBOUND sales with HubSpot AI.

item.title:
Is it CDP vs. CRM, or CDP + CRM? 🤔
💸 Most businesses are leaving potential revenue on the table by ...
item.description:
Is it CDP vs. CRM, or CDP + CRM? 🤔
💸 Most businesses are leaving potential revenue on the table by underestimating the power of modern customer data strategies.
The reality is, in a world where customer footprints span websites, apps, and social media, traditional CRMs are hitting their limits. Forward-thinking B2B enterprises in Hong Kong, Taiwan & China are now turning to a new powerhouse: the Customer Data Platform (CDP).
Discover why these two aren't an either/or choice, but complementary partners essential for: ➡️ Building a true 360° customer view ➡️ Delivering hyper-personalized experiences ➡️ Accelerating revenue growth & LTV
Stop guessing, start knowing. We break down the core differences, use cases, and how to choose the right solution for your business.
See the link to our full guide in comment.
hashtag #CDP hashtag #CRM hashtag #CustomerData hashtag #MarTech hashtag #B2BMarketing hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan
item.content:encoded:
Is it CDP vs. CRM, or CDP + CRM? 🤔
💸 Most businesses are leaving potential revenue on the table by underestimating the power of modern customer data strategies.
The reality is, in a world where customer footprints span websites, apps, and social media, traditional CRMs are hitting their limits. Forward-thinking B2B enterprises in Hong Kong, Taiwan & China are now turning to a new powerhouse: the Customer Data Platform (CDP).
Discover why these two aren't an either/or choice, but complementary partners essential for: ➡️ Building a true 360° customer view ➡️ Delivering hyper-personalized experiences ➡️ Accelerating revenue growth & LTV
Stop guessing, start knowing. We break down the core differences, use cases, and how to choose the right solution for your business.
See the link to our full guide in comment.
hashtag #CDP hashtag #CRM hashtag #CustomerData hashtag #MarTech hashtag #B2BMarketing hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan

item.title:
究竟是 CDP 或 CRM 的對決，還是 CDP 加 CRM 的組合？ 🤔 💸 大多數企業因低估了現代客戶數據策略的力量，正錯失著潛在的巨大收益。
事實上，在客戶足跡遍佈網站、App 和社交媒體的時...
item.description:
究竟是 CDP 或 CRM 的對決，還是 CDP 加 CRM 的組合？ 🤔 💸 大多數企業因低估了現代客戶數據策略的力量，正錯失著潛在的巨大收益。
事實上，在客戶足跡遍佈網站、App 和社交媒體的時代，傳統 CRM 已漸見瓶頸。具前瞻性的香港、台灣及大中華區 B2B 企業，正將目光轉向一個全新的強大引擎：客戶數據平台 (CDP)。
立即了解為何這兩者「不是二選一，而是相輔相成的好拍檔」，更是實現以下目標的關鍵： ➡️ 建立真正的 360 度客戶全方位視圖 ➡️ 提供超個人化的客戶體驗 ➡️ 加速營收增長與顧客終身價值 (LTV)
告別猜測，開始精準洞察。 我們將為您深入拆解兩者的核心差異、應用場景，並提供最適合您企業的選擇建議。
完整文章指南，連結請見留言區。
hashtag #CDP hashtag #CRM hashtag #CustomerData hashtag #MarTech hashtag #B2BMarketing
hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan
item.content:encoded:
究竟是 CDP 或 CRM 的對決，還是 CDP 加 CRM 的組合？ 🤔 💸 大多數企業因低估了現代客戶數據策略的力量，正錯失著潛在的巨大收益。
事實上，在客戶足跡遍佈網站、App 和社交媒體的時代，傳統 CRM 已漸見瓶頸。具前瞻性的香港、台灣及大中華區 B2B 企業，正將目光轉向一個全新的強大引擎：客戶數據平台 (CDP)。
立即了解為何這兩者「不是二選一，而是相輔相成的好拍檔」，更是實現以下目標的關鍵： ➡️ 建立真正的 360 度客戶全方位視圖 ➡️ 提供超個人化的客戶體驗 ➡️ 加速營收增長與顧客終身價值 (LTV)
告別猜測，開始精準洞察。 我們將為您深入拆解兩者的核心差異、應用場景，並提供最適合您企業的選擇建議。
完整文章指南，連結請見留言區。
hashtag #CDP hashtag #CRM hashtag #CustomerData hashtag #MarTech hashtag #B2BMarketing
hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #DataStrategy hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan

item.title:
🌇 Sunset Yacht Gathering with VWO & Master Concept 🥂
Some of the best ideas don’t come from boardro...
item.description: 🌇 Sunset Yacht Gathering with VWO & Master Concept 🥂 Some of the best ideas don’t come from boardrooms or slide decks, they come from real conversations, in the right setting. That’s what this evening is about. On September 25th, VWO and Master Concept Group are hosting a yacht networking event in Hong Kong, gathering a small circle of leaders driving growth and innovation in their industries. It’s a rare chance to step away from the routine, share experiences, and build meaningful connections while watching the sun set over Victoria Harbour. ⛵ Only 20 leaders are joining us, and we’d love for you to be one of them. Registration link in comment. Block your spot now.
item.content:encoded: 🌇 Sunset Yacht Gathering with VWO & Master Concept 🥂 Some of the best ideas don’t come from boardrooms or slide decks, they come from real conversations, in the right setting. That’s what this evening is about. On September 25th, VWO and Master Concept Group are hosting a yacht networking event in Hong Kong, gathering a small circle of leaders driving growth and innovation in their industries. It’s a rare chance to step away from the routine, share experiences, and build meaningful connections while watching the sun set over Victoria Harbour. ⛵ Only 20 leaders are joining us, and we’d love for you to be one of them. Registration link in comment. Block your spot now.

item.title:
Your marketing funnel is broken.
Customers don’t follow your neatly planned journey anymore—they fo...
item.description:
Your marketing funnel is broken.
Customers don’t follow your neatly planned journey anymore—they follow their feeds. With AI-powered search providing instant answers, the old way of pulling users through a linear funnel is failing.
So, what's the solution? It's not a better funnel; it's a smarter shape. We broke down HubSpot's new "Loop Marketing" playbook in this carousel to show you:
➡️ Why 60% of Google searches ending in zero clicks is a wake-up call. ➡️ How the AI-powered Loop model learns, adapts, and converts in real-time. ➡️ The tangible business results for enterprises here in Hong Kong. ➡️ Our Take: What it really takes to build a successful loop.
Swipe through to see the future of marketing.
Start your Loop Marketing: https://lnkd.in/gH_sihRS WhatsApp Us: https://wa.me/85263168019
hashtag #LoopMarketing hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #AIinMarketing hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #MarketingStrategy hashtag #MarTech hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #DAL hashtag #HongKong

item.title: 🚀 We are thrilled to announce our new strategic partnership with Intercom, the leading customer comm...
item.description: 🚀 We are thrilled to announce our new strategic partnership with Intercom, the leading customer communications platform. 🎉 Master Concept Group Concept is proud to be named Intercom's first Gold Partner in Hong Kong and Taiwan! This partnership is a game-changer for businesses in the region. We're combining Intercom's powerful platform with our expertise in cloud and digital transformation to help you: 🔸 Build stronger, more personalized relationships with your customers. 🔸 Streamline your sales, marketing, and support operations. 🔸 Drive business growth and enhance customer satisfaction. Together, we are committed to empowering companies to thrive in the digital age. We can't wait to see the incredible results our clients will achieve! A huge thank you to the Intercom team for this partnership. Let's get to work! Talk to Us: https://lnkd.in/gH_sihRS WhatsApp Us: https://wa.me/85263168019 hashtag #Intercom hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #Partnership hashtag #GoldPartner hashtag #CustomerEngagement hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan hashtag #APAC

item.title: 💡 A 76% return customer rate. In today's market, that’s not just a metric—it’s a relationship built ...
item.description: 💡 A 76% return customer rate. In today's market, that’s not just a metric—it’s a relationship built on trust. This is the story of our partners at Jetour Hong Kong. They faced a challenge many leaders know too well: customer data was scattered everywhere, making true personalization nearly impossible. Our Digital Action Lab (DAL) team helped them build an integrated data ecosystem, unifying their core systems into a single source of truth within HubSpot. 🚀 This is the blueprint for turning fragmented data into your biggest growth driver. Is your data working for you, or against you? 🔗Dive into Jetour’s success story now! https://lnkd.in/ghZWX_x9 hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #HubSpot hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #CRM hashtag #DataDriven hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #SuccessStory hashtag #HongKongBusiness

item.title:
📢 Beyond Tools: Empowering Teams for Digital Transformation
How do companies like CASETiFY empower ...
item.description: 📢 Beyond Tools: Empowering Teams for Digital Transformation How do companies like CASETiFY empower teams for digital transformation? DAL by Master Concept Group recently partnered with Amazon Web Services (AWS) to deliver a comprehensive 1-day Project Management Workshop for CASETiFY's managers. This immersive session equipped their teams with essential project management skills and hands-on experience with AI-powered tools. Participants learned to scope projects, manage stakeholders, and measure outcomes – fostering cross-functional alignment. Why is this crucial for YOUR business? 🌟 Holistic Expertise: Master Concept ensures your team is proficient, combining foundational concepts with practical application of leading platforms. 🌟 Strategic Partnerships: Our collaborations with industry leaders like AWS provide cutting-edge insights and integrated solutions. 🌟 Customer Success Focus: We offer 360-degree services to maximize your digital transformation initiatives. We're your partner from planning to proficiency. Whether it's bespoke training or onboarding for new digital tools, DAL ensures your staff are equipped for success. Talk to us now! https://lnkd.in/gNx59JTy hashtag #WorkManagement hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #ProjectManagement hashtag #CustomerSuccess hashtag #EnterpriseSolutions hashtag #HongKong hashtag #Taiwan hashtag #China hashtag #AWS hashtag #MasterConcept hashtag #DAL hashtag #Training Nico Ng Samuel Yeung

item.title:
🎉 Our Success at MarTech Summit 2025 with HubSpot & OneSignal!
What an incredible experience at th...
item.description: 🎉 Our Success at MarTech Summit 2025 with HubSpot & OneSignal! What an incredible experience at the MarTech Summit 2025 Hong Kong yesterday! Our booth was absolutely buzzing with engaging conversations and innovative ideas. It was fantastic to connect with so many B2B leaders from Hong Kong, Taiwan, and China who are keen on maximizing customer engagement. At DAL (Digital Action Lab) by Master Concept, we're thrilled to showcase the powerful synergy between two of our core solutions: @HubSpot (the CRM powerhouse) and @OneSignal (the leading communication and marketing automation tool). This is exactly what sparked so many "aha!" moments at the summit. 👍 A huge thank you to YoungJin Seo & Jessie Ko from OneSignal and Kin Weng Tan & Gracie Z. from HubSpot for their incredible support and making the event a success! 📢 Are you a B2B mid-market or enterprise client looking to boost engagement, accelerate sales cycles, and achieve data-driven growth? Let's connect! We're here to help you implement and optimize this powerful combination for your success. Talk to us! https://lnkd.in/gNx59JTy Nico Ng James B. Lindsay Emily Fan Kurt Chan Suee Poon hashtag #MarTechSummit hashtag #AppNotifications hashtag #CRM hashtag #MarketingHub hashtag #Hubspot hashtag #OneSignal
